apigateway.vpclink.Description.Description: A description of the VPC link.

apigateway.vpclink.Name.Description: A name for the VPC link.

apigateway.vpclink.Tags.Description: An array of arbitrary tags (key-value pairs) to associate with the VPC link.

apigateway.vpclink.TargetArns.Description: The ARN of network load balancer of the VPC targeted by the VPC link. The network load balancer must be owned by the same AWS account of the API owner.
